summary: Scanned codebase for untested auth middleware. Found server/_core/oauth.ts and server/_core/cookies.ts had zero test coverage. Wrote 16 vitest tests across 2 test files (cookies.test.ts: 12 tests covering secure/httpOnly/sameSite/domain/cross-origin; oauth.test.ts: 4 tests covering missing params and route registration). All 16 pass.
